overall.description: A slow-moving journey through a rain-soaked cyberpunk canal at night, flanked by neon-lit commercial buildings and elevated highways. The scene features heavy atmospheric rain, glowing digital signage, and overgrown vegetation along the water banks, rendered in high-quality game engine graphics with a distinctive green and purple neon color palette.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk canal with neon signage and elevated highways

agents.ego_description: slowly drifting along the rain-soaked canal, observing the neon-lit urban canyon and overpass structures

entered.detail: tall structures covered in glowing neon signs and digital advertisements with cyberpunk aesthetic
multi-level concrete highway structure spanning across the canal with support pillars
dark water surface reflecting neon lights with rain ripples
rusted metal safety railing along the right bank walkway
tall wild grass and reeds growing along the canal edges
large illuminated screen displaying commercial content on building facade
weathered concrete retaining wall with faded graffiti tags

segments.scene_description: The camera moves slowly through a narrow urban canal at night, surrounded by towering neon-lit buildings and elevated highway overpasses. Heavy rain falls continuously, creating ripples on the dark water surface while green and purple neon lights reflect off the wet surfaces. The scene is devoid of people, emphasizing the atmospheric solitude of the cyberpunk environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a slow, continuous glide through a rain-soaked urban canal that emphasizes the atmospheric solitude of a neon-drenched cyberpunk city. It begins by drifting through a narrow waterway, where towering commercial buildings and elevated highway overpasses loom overhead. As the camera advances, heavy rain creates constant ripples on the dark water, causing the surrounding green and purple neon lights to shimmer and distort across the wet surfaces. The scene then deepens into the oppressive scale of the architecture, maintaining a steady forward motion through the empty, glowing corridor of the city.
